name: Yubo International Biotech Ltd
business: Yubo Beijing is a technology company focused on the research and development and application of endometrial stem cells. It offers products under the VIVCELL brand including healthcare products for respiratory system, skincare products, hair care products, healthy beverages, and male and female personal care products, as well as stem cell related services such as cell testing and health management consulting.

exposures.sentence: Yubo Beijing is a technology company focused on the research and development and application of endometrial stem cells.
Yubo Beijing plans to build a first-class stem cell storage facility, which we believe, will be the first global bank of endometrial stem cells.
